Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Great Stage Park
Manchester, TN
Previous Names:
Sam McAllister's Farm (Changed after 2006)
Bonnaroo Manchester Farm (Changed after 2009)
Seating Capacity: 100000
Venue Type : Festival

Total Gigs: 3
  DMB  (2)
  Dave & Friends  (1)

Longest Performance:
06.11.04 - Thank You (Falettinme Be Mice Elf Agin) (18:40)
Description
Bonnaroo Music Festival is located on a 700-acre farm in Manchester, TN, which is about 60 miles southeast of Nashville and northwest of Chattanooga. The main stage has become known as "What Stage," and that is where both Dave & Friends and DMB have played when they have performed at Bonnaroo.

1560 New Bushy Branch Rd.
Manchester, TN 37355
